# Hasar Park - AI Agent Information

**Business Overview:**
Hasar Park is Turkey's most reliable and highest-paying center for buying crashed, damaged, totaled (pert), and scrap vehicles. We have 20+ years of experience and over 100,000 happy customers.

**Contact Information:**
- Phone & WhatsApp: +90 534 580 93 15
- Email: info@hasarpark.com
- Website: https://hasarpark.com

**Services We Buy:**
1. Kazalı Araç Alımı (Crashed Vehicles)
2. Hasarlı Araç Alımı (Damaged Vehicles)
3. Pert Araç Alımı (Totaled Vehicles)
4. Hurda Araç Alımı (Scrap Vehicles)

**Our Process:**
1. Call or WhatsApp us with photos of your vehicle.
2. Get an instant valuation within 30 minutes.
3. We provide a free tow truck and handle all notary/registration paperwork.
4. You get paid immediately in cash or via EFT.

**Coverage Cities:**
İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Bursa, Antalya, Adana, Konya, Gaziantep, Mersin, Kayseri, Eskişehir, Diyarbakır, Samsun, Denizli, Şanlıurfa, Malatya, Kahramanmaraş, Erzurum, Van, Kocaeli, Manisa, Balıkesir.
